name: Artemis Gold Inc.
description: Artemis Gold Inc. is a gold development company focused on creating shareholder value through the identification, acquisition, and development of gold projects in mining-friendly jurisdictions. The company's primary asset is the Blackwater Gold Project in central British Columbia, Canada, which is one of the largest open-pit gold deposits in the world. Artemis Gold is committed to developing Blackwater into a world-class, low-cost, and environmentally responsible gold mine, leveraging a highly experienced management team with a proven track record of successful mine development and operation.
